common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

checkin.title: Check in
checkin.footer: Your place is reserved the moment you submit. We'll WhatsApp you when you're nearly up.
checkin.no_services: No services available right now — please ask staff for assistance.
checkin.invalid: This check-in link is invalid or no longer active.

errors.pick_service: Please pick a service to continue.
errors.enter_name: Please enter your name so staff can call you.
errors.valid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number — we'll WhatsApp you when it's your turn.
errors.could_not_token: Could not reserve your spot. Please try again.
errors.could_not_checkin: Could not complete check-in. Please try again or ask staff for help.

ticket.walk_in_now: Walk in now — staff is ready for you.
ticket.service_complete: We hope to see you again.
ticket.thanks_visit: It was a pleasure serving you at {{branchName}}.
ticket.no_show_body: This ticket was closed because we couldn't reach you. Please check in again at the counter.
ticket.cancelled_body: This ticket was cancelled. You're welcome to check in again.
ticket.keep_open: Your spot is secured. This page updates live — no need to refresh.
ticket.share_location_body: We'll see when you're close and pace your call to your real arrival — so you don't have to guess. Tracking auto-stops when you're served.
ticket.location_denied: Location sharing was declined — that's fine. Watch this page for updates instead.
ticket.location_unsupported: Your browser doesn't support location sharing — watch this page for updates.
ticket.tracking_stops: Tracking stops automatically when you're served. We don't keep this data after.

booking.title: Book ahead
booking.subtitle: Choose your service and time — your slot is locked in instantly.
booking.no_slots: Fully booked for this day — try another day below.
booking.confirmed_body: Your slot is confirmed. We'll WhatsApp {{phone}} a reminder before you're due.
